response_constraints: Do not issue the summary update until the retrieval result is available.
Preserve the budget and catering statements verbatim while replacing the obsolete venue statement.

stages.purpose: Retrieve the current recursive summary before constructing its replacement.

arguments.summary: Planning: budget cap $18,000 approved; caterer undecided; venue selection postponed until September.

stages.purpose: Update the summary using the retrieved text, changing only the venue decision.

state_assertions: The recursive summary contains the September venue postponement.
The recursive summary still contains the approved $18,000 cap and undecided caterer.

prompt: Retrieve my planning summary, replace the July venue walkthrough with “venue selection postponed until September,” and preserve the approved budget cap and undecided caterer exactly.

tool_results.summary: Planning: budget cap $18,000 approved; caterer undecided; venue walkthrough booked for 2026-07-28.
